input.question: How many course sections does each professor teach?

payload.question: How many course sections does each professor teach?

output.sql:
SELECT
  p.professor_id AS professor_id,
  p.name AS professor_name,
  COUNT(s.section_id) AS section_count
FROM professors AS p
LEFT JOIN course_sections AS s
  ON s.professor_id = p.professor_id
GROUP BY p.professor_id, p.name
ORDER BY section_count DESC;

visualization.description: Bar chart showing number of course sections taught by each professor.
visualization.title: Course sections per professor

payload.sql:
SELECT
  p.professor_id AS professor_id,
  p.name AS professor_name,
  COUNT(s.section_id) AS section_count
FROM professors AS p
LEFT JOIN course_sections AS s
  ON s.professor_id = p.professor_id
GROUP BY p.professor_id, p.name
ORDER BY section_count DESC;
